scripts.check: npm run check:data && npm run build
scripts.deploy:push: npm run build && git add -A && git commit -m "update game" && git push
scripts.check:data: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of fs.readdirSync('data/game')) if (f.endsWith('.json')) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data/game/'+f,'utf8')); console.log('data json OK')"
